name: iamhumans
description: Humanization layer for LLM conversation. v2.6.0: 167 net-new rules across Wave 1A (5 cultural clusters), Wave 1B (4 life-stage clusters), and Wave 1C (4 structural-trauma clusters: neurodivergence, disability/chronic illness, incarceration, displacement). 20 core personality modules. 254-case eval corpus. ~140 books + 30+ clinical sources. 2193-line SKILL.md.
